summary: Decent recording of a solid San Diego show with a pleasing rare‑tune setlist, though no particular moments stand out.
review: Both reviewers attended the concert and describe it as an enjoyable night with a good mix of rarer material that kept things fresh. While no specific songs or performance highlights are called out, the overall impression is positive enough to place the show among personal top‑20 memories. No comments on the audio source were provided, so recording quality cannot be definitively assessed.

ai_rating.rationale: Based on two attendee reviews averaging 3‑4 stars and generally positive language about the show; lack of recording details limits confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers did not mention any soundboard, audience, or matrix source, nor note clarity or mix issues.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Listeners appreciated the inclusion of rarer tunes and felt the overall set was enjoyable despite a few less‑impressive versions.
